title: cynometra stenopetala
intro: Cynometra stenopetala, also known as the African walnut or buah keras, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cynometra stenopetala include its potential to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Cynometra stenopetala can be prepared in various herbal forms, including extracts, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health problems.
